title: Vicioides sylvatica
taxonomy: Vicioides sylvatica is classified within the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume family. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics, such as its bean-like fruit and compound leaves. The genus Vicioides is often grouped with other related genera, including Vicia and Lathyrus. Within the Fabaceae family, Vicioides sylvatica is part of the subfamily Faboideae. Further classification may also involve the order Fabales or the larger clade of flowering plants known as angiosperms.
